headline: Acme receives FDA approval for cardiac device
body: The company said approval clears commercial launch in the United States.

headline: Regulator approves Acme product ahead of schedule
body: Management expects the approval to accelerate near-term revenue.

headline: Acme faces lawsuit over medical device marketing
body: A customer group filed a complaint alleging misleading claims.

headline: Acme lawsuit expands after product approval
body: Additional plaintiffs joined litigation related to the product launch.

headline: Acme raises annual guidance after strong orders
body: Executives cited faster adoption and higher backlog visibility.

headline: Acme cuts revenue guidance on delayed shipments
body: The company said supply delays will weigh on current-quarter sales.

headline: Acme wins major hospital network contract
body: The multi-year agreement expands distribution across several states.

headline: Acme reports mixed earnings and slower device margins
body: Revenue beat expectations, but gross margin guidance disappointed investors.
